css: .prompt-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fdfbfb 0%, #f6eff0 100%); width: 100%; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.02); padding: 2.5rem 10px; margin: 0 auto 3rem; } .prompt-card .pin-title { font-size: inherit; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: normal; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 2rem; width: 100%; max-width: 100%; text-align: center; } .prompt-card .description-container { margin-bottom: 2.5rem; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding-bottom: 1.5rem; } .prompt-card .description-text { font-size: 1.05rem; color: #444; line-height: 1.6; font-style: italic; max-width: 44rem; margin: 0 auto; text-align: left; padding: 0 1.25rem; } .prompt-card .prompt-list { width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; } .prompt-card .prompt-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 3.2rem; gap: 0.5rem; } .prompt-card .prompt-number { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #b8b8b8; padding-top: 2px; min-width: 1.5rem; text-align: left; } .prompt-card .prompt-text { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; color: #222; line-height: 1.6; flex: 1; } @media (min-width: 768px) { .prompt-card { max-width: 52rem; border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 4.5rem 3.5rem; margin: 3rem auto 5rem; } .prompt-card .pin-title { margin-bottom: 2.5rem; } .prompt-card .description-container { margin-bottom: 3.5rem; padding-bottom: 2rem; } .prompt-card .prompt-item { gap: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 2.75rem; } .prompt-card .prompt-number { font-size: 1.25rem; min-width: 2.2rem; text-align: right; } .prompt-card .prompt-text { font-size: 1.15rem; } }
html:
10 Journal Prompts to Record New Discoveries While Travelling

Traveling opens your eyes to new sights, sounds, and cultures. Use these prompts to capture those fleeting first impressions and turn your hidden discoveries into lifelong memories.

1.
What was the very first thing that caught your eye, surprised you, or felt different the moment you stepped outside to explore this place?
2.
If you could only tell someone at home about one specific thing you did, saw, or experienced during this journey, what would it be?
3.
Describe a new food, drink, or local snack you tried. What did it taste like, and where were you sitting when you enjoyed it?
4.
Did you stumble across a hidden street, a cozy café, or a beautiful building that wasn't on your itinerary? Describe this unexpected discovery.
5.
What does this place sound like right now? Write down the sounds surrounding you—whether it’s a bustling market, nature, or unique transit sounds.
6.
Did you have a memorable interaction, a shared smile, or a helpful moment with a local or a fellow traveler?
7.
Look around you right now. If you had to turn your current view into a postcard, how would you describe the scenery, colors, and atmosphere?
8.
Did you navigate something completely new, like a language barrier or a confusing transit system? What did you learn about yourself through handling it?
9.
What is a specific smell, texture, or temperature that defines this destination (e.g., the smell of street food, old cobblestones, or a cool ocean breeze)?
10.
What is one thing you learned about the local culture, history, or way of life that you didn't know before arriving?
